mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER_ADDRESS ( USER_ID, ADDRESS_NM, RECEIVER_NM, RECEIVER_TEL, RECEIVER_TEL2, ZIP_CD, ADDR_ROAD, ADDR_JIBUN, ADDR_DTL, DELIVERY_MSG, DEFAULT_YN, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{addressNm}, #{receiverNm}, #{receiverTel}, #{receiverTel2}, #{zipCd}, #{addrRoad}, #{addrJibun}, #{addrDtl}, #{deliveryMsg}, NVL(#{defaultYn}, 'N'), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_ADDRESS SET ADDRESS_NM = #{addressNm}, RECEIVER_NM = #{receiverNm}, RECEIVER_TEL = #{receiverTel}, RECEIVER_TEL2 = #{receiverTel2}, ZIP_CD = #{zipCd}, ADDR_ROAD = #{addrRoad}, ADDR_JIBUN = #{addrJibun}, ADDR_DTL = #{addrDtl}, DELIVERY_MSG = #{deliveryMsg}, DEFAULT_YN = NVL(#{defaultYn}, 'N'), MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHERE ADDRESS_SN = #{addressSn} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT ADDRESS_SN, USER_ID, ADDRESS_NM, RECEIVER_NM, RECEIVER_TEL, RECEIVER_TEL2, ZIP_CD, ADDR_ROAD, ADDR_JIBUN, ADDR_DTL, DELIVERY_MSG, DEFAULT_YN, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM MEMBER_ADDRESS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY DEFAULT_YN DESC, REG_DT DESC

SELECT ADDRESS_SN, USER_ID, ADDRESS_NM, RECEIVER_NM, RECEIVER_TEL, RECEIVER_TEL2, ZIP_CD, ADDR_ROAD, ADDR_JIBUN, ADDR_DTL, DELIVERY_MSG, DEFAULT_YN, REG_DT, MDFCN_DT FROM MEMBER_ADDRESS WHERE ADDRESS_SN = #{addressSn}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER_ADDRESS SET DEFAULT_YN = 'N', MDFCN_DT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEFAULT_YN = 'Y'
